zh-cn.exp_event_cavePit_result_alternatePath: $names$找到了一条绕过裂缝的替代路径
zh-cn.exp_event_cavePit_result_fatigue: $names$尝试跨越裂缝后感到极度疲惫

en-us.exp_event_cavePit_ongoing: $names$ encountered a deep pit in the cave that needs to be crossed
en-us.exp_event_cavePit_result_alternatePath: $names$ found an alternate path around the pit
en-us.exp_event_cavePit_result_fatigue: $names$ became extremely fatigued after attempting to cross the pit
en-us.exp_event_cavePit_result_slip: $names$ slipped and got injured while crossing the pit
en-us.exp_event_cavePit_result_equipmentLoss: $names$ lost some equipment while crossing the pit
